about_me.one_line_intro: Fullstack developer focused on backend, passionate about CLI tools and dedicated to building clean, efficient, and scalable solutions.
about_me.introduction_desc: I am a fullstack developer with a backend focus, graduated from Instituto Federal do Rio Grande do Sul in Systems Analysis and Development, with a GPA of 9.3 and a top-graded final project. I have experience building both frontend and backend applications using technologies such as TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind, Spring, and Golang, as well as Rust, Lua, and Python across various projects. In my daily workflow, I rely on tools like Git, Docker, Neovim, and Linux to optimize productivity and streamline development processes. I have a solid foundation in software engineering, RESTful API design, design patterns, databases, and containerization, always aiming to deliver well-structured and maintainable solutions. Beyond technical skills, I value problem-solving, adaptability, creativity, teamwork, and continuous learning.
